title: Workspace Dependencies And SDK Crate Skeleton
description: Add workspace members and create the revdeck-plugin-sdk crate skeleton.
convergence_criteria: cargo metadata recognizes revdeck-plugin-sdk; crate compiles; no behavior changes outside workspace config and skeleton
hints: Read Cargo.toml and revdeck-core object/export patterns
findings: Workspace now includes revdeck-plugin-sdk, revdeck-plugin-host, and plugin SDK tests; SDK exports manifest, permissions, object_batch, and validation modules.

title: Manifest And ObjectBatch Contracts
description: Implement plugin manifest, permission model, ObjectBatch graph delta schema, and dry-run validation.
convergence_criteria: valid manifest parses; invalid fixtures return structured reports; ObjectBatch dry-run validates simple graph; SDK types serialize/deserialize
hints: Use revdeck-core ObjectRef/ObjectKind/EdgeKind and brainstorm F-001/F-002
findings: SDK supports TOML manifest parsing, semver compatibility validation, default-deny permissions, serializable ObjectBatch facts, deterministic summaries, and dangling-edge checks.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-plugin-sdk passed; cargo test --workspace passed

title: Plugin Run Audit Schema
description: Add host-owned plugin run audit storage without polluting analysis run semantics.
convergence_criteria: migrations idempotent; plugin run records round-trip; analysis run tests do not regress
hints: Keep plugin lifecycle separate from latest analysis status
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-db plugin; cargo test -p revdeck-db migrations
findings: Added schema version 5 with plugin_runs table plus repository create/update/list helpers and round-trip audit coverage.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-db plugin_runs_round_trip_audit_record passed; cargo test --workspace passed

title: Plugin Host Dry-Run And Safety Skeleton
description: Create revdeck-plugin-host for manifest validation, plugin directory tests, ObjectBatch dry-run, and safety skeleton.
convergence_criteria: dry-run never mutates DB; permission denial is structured; runner skeleton is testable without launching untrusted code; host crate has focused tests
hints: Use revdeck-db audit and SDK validation reports
findings: Host validates and inspects manifests, tests plugin directories, computes digests, dry-runs ObjectBatch fixtures, and records sanitized audit data through explicit host APIs.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-plugin-host passed; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings passed

title: CLI Plugin Commands
description: Expose revdeck plugin validate, inspect, and test as JSON-producing CLI commands.
convergence_criteria: validate returns success JSON; inspect shows capabilities and permissions; test runs manifest and dry-run checks; existing commands unchanged
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-cli; cargo run -p revdeck-cli -- plugin validate fixtures/plugins/valid-minimal/revdeck-plugin.toml
findings: CLI now has nested plugin commands wired to revdeck-plugin-host with structured JSON output and non-zero failures for invalid plugin input.
tests_passed: cargo run plugin validate/inspect/test passed; installed revdeck plugin validate/inspect/test passed

title: Plugin SDK Conformance Tests
description: Add fixture-backed integration coverage for manifest validation, ObjectBatch dry-run, and CLI plugin commands.
convergence_criteria: valid fixture passes; invalid fixture fails; CLI tests cover validate/inspect/test; ObjectBatch dry-run proves no commit path
hints: Mirror tests/commands and tests/tui integration crate style
findings: Added valid-minimal and invalid-missing-capability fixtures, object-batch fixture, SDK validation tests, host directory test, and CLI integration coverage.
tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-plugin-sdk-tests passed; cargo test --workspace passed

title: README And Full Verification
description: Document plugin SDK preview and run full formatting, lint, tests, smoke, and install verification.
convergence_criteria: README reflects M1 behavior; all CLI smoke commands pass; full workspace verification passes
hints: Document preview scope, non-goals, manifest example, CLI commands, safety limitations, and adapter roadmap
execution_directives: cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo test --workspace; revdeck plugin validate/inspect/test
findings: README includes Plugin SDK Preview usage and caveats; full verification passed; cargo install initially hit a locked revdeck.exe, then succeeded after stopping the stale analyze process.
tests_passed: fmt, clippy, workspace tests, cargo-run smoke, global install, and installed revdeck smoke all passed
